name: Efficient and Privacy Aware Edge Cloud Collaborative Inference for Large Language Models
summary: arXiv:2607.13093v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: On-device LLM inference faces a trilemma of response latency, limited hardware resources and user privacy. Full cloud inference delivers strong com...
description: arXiv:2607.13093v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: On-device LLM inference faces a trilemma of response latency, limited hardware resources and user privacy. Full cloud inference delivers strong computing power but exposes user prompts and dialogue data, while standalone on-device inference is unfeasible for most consumer and embedded edge devices. This paper presents a privacy-centric edge-clou...
author: Yi Li, Chen Li, Jiexiong Liu
